dimensions.title: Production SHA matches main HEAD
dimensions.evidence: Last successful deploy run 28415953590 (2026-06-30T02:22:31Z) shipped 8deccace, which is now 6+ days and dozens of commits behind main HEAD 5fe69db9. No deploy has run since. Production is running stale code.

dimensions.title: Ingestor ran successfully within 30 minutes
dimensions.evidence: BLOCKED_EXTERNAL (UTV2-1477): last ingestor.cycle system_runs row 2026-06-30T12:55:01Z. Root cause is an SGO provider-side account-probe rejection (known SGO outage per PM), not a code defect or invalid credential — resolveActiveSgoApiKey resolves once at boot and a failed probe (timeout or provider outage) disables ingestion for the container's lifetime until SGO recovers and the process restarts (tracked: UTV2-1478). provider_offer_history latest row 2026-06-30T12:45:12Z, consistent with the same external block.

dimensions.title: No stuck outbox rows older than 30 minutes
dimensions.evidence: 1111 pending — ALL bucket:governance_hold (attempt_count=0; 632 discord:canary, 479 discord:best-bets). worker.heartbeat system_runs rows confirm the worker process is alive and cycling normally (611 heartbeats in the trailing hour as of 2026-07-06T14:37Z) — it is healthy-idle, not wedged; it simply has zero claimable rows for its own configured target (tracked for target-scope clarification: UTV2-1479). True stuck rows (bucket:retryable + bucket:stale_unknown): 0. True delivery failures (bucket:true_failure): 0. Governance holds do not count as stuck rows per QUEUE_READINESS_SEMANTICS.md (UTV2-1320).

dimensions.title: Dead-letter queue: zero true delivery failures
dimensions.evidence: 946 dead_letter rows — ALL bucket:governance_hold (attempt_count=0). True delivery failures (bucket:true_failure, attempt_count>=max_attempts): 0. Phase 7A governance brake holds are not delivery failures per QUEUE_READINESS_SEMANTICS.md (UTV2-1320).

dimensions.title: No CRITICAL DB tripwires active
dimensions.evidence: G-CONST-12 closed (db-health-tripwire CI guard), G-CONST-13 closed (production SHA aligned). G-CONST-11 PM-deferred (retention execution). No remaining critical open tripwires. Not re-audited this cycle — carried forward from last confirmed state; no new tripwire activity observed during the UTV2-1477 investigation.

dimensions.evidence: SHA-bound proof bundles present on main for UTV2-1311 through UTV2-1315, UTV2-1473, UTV2-1475 (plus earlier lanes). All SHA-tied to merge commits.
